fields.label: AppLocker audit/block events
fields.collector:
$auditIds = 8003, 8006, 8020
$blockIds = 8004, 8007, 8022
$ids = $auditIds + $blockIds
$startTime = (Get-Date).AddHours(-24)
$logs = @('Microsoft-Windows-AppLocker/EXE and DLL', 'Microsoft-Windows-AppLocker/MSI and Script', 'Microsoft-Windows-AppLocker/Packaged app-Execution')
$events = foreach ($log in $logs) {
    Get-WinEvent -FilterHashtable @{ LogName = $log; Id = $ids; StartTime = $startTime } -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object {
        $xml = [xml]$_.ToXml()
        $data = $xml.Event.UserData.RuleAndFileData
        $publisher = [string]$data.Fqbn
        # Normalize odd Unicode/control characters for stable KQL display.
        # Keep regular Unicode letters/symbols; drop replacement/zero-width/bidi/control artifacts.
        $publisher = $publisher -replace [char]0xFFFD, ''
        $publisher = $publisher -replace '[\u0000-\u001F\u007F]', ''
        $publisher = $publisher -replace '[\u200B-\u200D\uFEFF]', ''
        $publisher = $publisher -replace '[\u202A-\u202E\u2066-\u2069]', ''
        $publisher = $publisher -replace '[\s\u00A0]+', ' '
        $publisher = $publisher.Trim()
        [pscustomobject]@{
            EventTimeUtc   = $_.TimeCreated.ToUniversalTime().ToString('o')
            EventRecordId  = [long]$_.RecordId
            EventId        = [int]$_.Id
            EventType      = if ($blockIds -contains $_.Id) { 'Denied' } else { 'Audited' }
            RuleCollection = switch -Wildcard ($log) { '*EXE and DLL*' { 'Exe/Dll' } '*MSI and Script*' { 'Msi/Script' } '*Packaged*' { 'PackagedApp' } default { $log } }
            PolicyName     = $data.PolicyName
            RuleName       = $data.RuleName
            FilePath       = $data.FilePath
            FileName       = if ($data.FilePath) { Split-Path -Leaf $data.FilePath } else { $null }
            FileHash       = $data.FileHash
            Publisher      = $publisher
            TargetUser     = $data.TargetUser
        }
    }
}
@($events)

column.name: AppLockerEvents
column.description: AppLocker audited (would-have-blocked) and denied execution events from the last 24h as a JSON array. Includes EventRecordId so duplicates from overlapping runs can be removed in KQL (dedup on AppLockerEventRecordId + DeviceName).

column.name: AppLockerEventTime
column.description: UTC time the AppLocker event was logged (Event.TimeCreated).

column.name: AppLockerEventRecordId
column.description: Per-log EventRecordId of the source event. Stable per device + log, so combine with DeviceName to dedupe overlapping uploads in KQL.

column.name: AppLockerEventType
column.description: Audited (would have been blocked in audit mode) or Denied (blocked in enforce mode).

column.name: AppLockerRuleCollection
column.description: AppLocker rule collection: Exe/Dll, Msi/Script, or PackagedApp.

column.name: AppLockerPolicyName
column.description: Name of the AppLocker policy/rule collection that matched (UserData.RuleAndFileData.PolicyName).

column.name: AppLockerRuleName
column.description: Name of the AppLocker rule that matched (UserData.RuleAndFileData.RuleName).

column.name: AppLockerFilePath
column.description: Full path of the file the event refers to (UserData.RuleAndFileData.FilePath).

column.name: AppLockerFileName
column.description: Leaf file name parsed from the event file path.

column.name: AppLockerFileHash
column.description: SHA-256 file hash recorded by AppLocker (UserData.RuleAndFileData.FileHash).

column.name: AppLockerPublisher
column.description: Fully qualified binary name / publisher of the signed file (UserData.RuleAndFileData.Fqbn); empty for unsigned files.

column.name: AppLockerTargetUser
column.description: SID of the user the rule was evaluated for (UserData.RuleAndFileData.TargetUser).
